RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: private
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A freshly enlisted colonist soldier. The oath has been sworn and the kit drawn — everything else is yet to be earned.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: private first class
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A soldier who has proven they can shoulder basic duties without supervision. The first acknowledgement that they are no longer raw.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: corporal
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A junior non-commissioned officer entrusted with a fireteam. The first taste of command, and the first chance to stand accountable for others.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: sergeant
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A seasoned non-commissioned officer who runs a squad. They enforce the standards their seniors set, day in and day out.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: staff sergeant
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: An experienced section leader who handles a platoon's daily affairs. Where junior sergeants drill the troops, the staff sergeant runs the schedule.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: sergeant first class
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: The senior non-commissioned officer of a platoon, mentoring lieutenants and shepherding the junior sergeants under their wing.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: master sergeant
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A principal staff NCO at company level, trusted with administration, logistics, and complex operations beyond a single platoon.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: first sergeant
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: The senior NCO of a company, answerable for the readiness and discipline of every soldier under its banner.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: sergeant major
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A senior enlisted advisor at battalion level. The bridge between a commander's intent and the company NCOs who must make it real.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: command sergeant major
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: The senior enlisted soldier of a color-bearing unit. Their authority over the rank and file is matched only by the formation's commanding officer.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: sergeant major of the army
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: The senior enlisted soldier in the entire army, and the voice of every soldier who has ever drawn rations under its colors.
